step_rationale: RPTOR (mTORC1 core component) regulates metabolic and inflammatory responses; causal target in oxidative stress-CAD pathway.
mechanism: RPTOR is a causal target linking oxidative stress and mTOR-driven metabolic dysregulation to plaque inflammation and atherothrombosis.

references.title: Oxidative Stress-Related Genome-Wide Mendelian Randomization Identifies Causal Genes for Coronary Artery Disease.
